> >Description:
>  comms/gnuradio (gnuradio-3.6.5_3) could not be built. It fails to find system
>  iconv.
>  
>  Another problem is that ghuradio requirte about 1 GIGABYTE of dependencies.
>  gtk2 + wxWindows + QT4 + TK at same time looks... BAD.
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> cd /usr/ports/comms/gnuradio && make install clean
>
